fields.attention_is_all_you_need_2017_architect: encoder-decoder (N=6 encoder layers + N=6 decoder layers, with cross-attention from decoder to encoder)
fields.bert_2018_architecture_role: encoder-only multi-layer bidirectional Transformer (based on Vaswani et al., 2017)

markdown:
| Dimension | Evidence-backed comparison | |---|---| | Architecture | The original Transformer is an encoder-decoder architecture with a stack of N=6 identical encoder layers and a stack of N=6 identical decoder layers, where each encoder layer has a multi-head self-attention sub-layer and a position-wise feed-forward network, and each decoder layer additionally performs multi-head attention over the encoder stack. [1][2][3][4]
BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation from Vaswani et al. (2017), and BERT uses the Transformer self-attention mechanism to unify text-pair encoding with what is effectively bidirectional cross attention between two sentences. [5][6][7][8] | | Directionality | In the original Transformer, each position in the encoder self-attention can attend to all positions in the previous layer, while the decoder self-attention is modified to prevent positions from attending to subsequent positions, so predictions for position i depend only on known outputs at positions less than i. [2][9][10][11] | Unresolved from the available corpus evidence: - bert_2018_directionality - attention_is_all_you_need_2017_training_objective - bert_2018_training_objective Sources [1] Attention Is All You Need, 3.1 Encoder and Decoder Stacks, p. 3 [2] Attention Is All You Need, 3.1 Encoder and Decoder Stacks, p. 3 [3] Attention Is All You Need, 3.3 Position-wise Feed-Forward Networks, p. 5 [4] Attention Is All You Need, 7 Conclusion, p. 10 [5] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3 [6] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3 [7] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3.2 Fine-tuning BERT, p. 5 [8] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, Abstract, p. 1 [9] Attention Is All You Need, 3.2.3 Applications of Attention in our Model, p. 5 [10] Attention Is All You Need, 4 Why Self-Attention, p. 6 [11] Attention Is All You Need, 2 Background, p. 2
